text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 CNN: Trump officials are internally discussing details for a potential second, in-person meeting with Iranian officials before the ceasefire between Washington and Tehran expires next week, should the opportunity present itself, a source familiar with the talks told CNN, though it’s unclear whether such a meeting could materialize. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 CNN：一位熟悉谈判的消息人士告诉CNN，特朗普政府官员正在内部讨论在下周华盛顿与德黑兰之间的停火协议到期前，如果机会出现，可能与伊朗官员进行第二次面对面会晤的细节，尽管目前尚不清楚此类会晤能否实现。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 红色警报警报器正在以色列北部对抗线地区响起。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 无人机警报警报器在以色列北部对抗线地区处于激活状态。@wfwitness

text: 🇰🇲 Elpis, a Comoros-flagged oil and chemical "shadow fleet" tanker sanctioned by the U.S. in 2025 for handling Iranian petroleum, appears to be challenging Trump’s blockade. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇰🇲 “Elpis”是一艘悬挂科摩罗旗帜的油轮和化学品“影子船队”油轮，因处理伊朗石油而在2025年受到美国制裁，目前似乎正在挑战特朗普的封锁。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 红色警报警报器正在以色列北部对抗线地区响起。@wfwitness

text: Instead of taking the usual route through the Mediterranean and Red Sea, the USS George H.W. Bush is sailing the much longer route around Africa to reach the Persian Gulf. The detour avoids Houthi-controlled waters like the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb. Source: USNI
text_zh: 乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（USS George H.W. Bush）没有走通常的地中海和红海航线，而是绕道非洲，走了一条长得多的航线前往波斯湾。此举避开了胡塞武装控制的水域，如红海和曼德海峡。来源：USNI

text: OSINTtechnical The USS George H.W. Bush carrier strike group is taking the long way around Africa to the Middle East as it avoids the Red Sea -USNI https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043777018249023885/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 乔治·H·W·布什号航母打击群正在绕道非洲前往中东，以避开红海 -USNI https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043777018249023885/photo/1 推文

text: Instead of taking the usual route through the Mediterranean and Red Sea, the USS George H.W. Bush is sailing the much longer route around Africa to reach the Persian Gulf. The detour avoids Houthi-controlled waters like the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb. Source: USNI
text_zh: 乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（USS George H.W. Bush）没有走通常的地中海和红海航线，而是绕道非洲，走了一条长得多的航线前往波斯湾。此举避开了胡塞武装控制的水域，如红海和曼德海峡。来源：USNI

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇩 🇨🇳 BIG | The United States is strengthening its positions in the Indo-Pacific to counter China’s dominance and is signing a strategic defense agreement with Indonesia. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and Indonesia’s Minister of Defense Sjafrie Sjamsoeddin announced a new Major Defense Cooperation Partnership at the Pentagon, aimed at strengthening military ties and maintaining stability in the Indo-Pacific. ➡️ The agreement focuses on three pillars: capacity building, training and education, and joint operations. It also includes plans to co-develop advanced technologies, especially in maritime, subsurface, and autonomous systems, and expand special forces cooperation. ➡️ Both sides emphasized the growing relationship, which already includes over 170 joint exercises annually, and described the partnership as the start of a new phase in long-term U.S.-Indonesia defense cooperation. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇩 🇨🇳 重磅 | 美国正在加强其在印太地区的地位以对抗中国的主导地位，并正在与印度尼西亚签署一项战略防御协议。战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）和印度尼西亚国防部长沙弗里·沙姆苏丁（Sjafrie Sjamsoeddin）在五角大楼宣布了一项新的主要国防合作伙伴关系，旨在加强军事联系并维护印太地区的稳定。➡️ 该协议侧重于三个支柱：能力建设、培训与教育以及联合行动。它还包括共同开发先进技术的计划，特别是在海事、水下和自主系统方面，并扩大特种部队合作。➡️ 双方强调了日益增长的关系，该关系每年已经包括超过170次联合演习，并将这种伙伴关系描述为美印尼长期国防合作新阶段的开始。通过我们查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel Péter Magyar: If Vladimir Putin calls me, I will pick up the phone. I do not think that will happen. I will not call him myself, but if we do talk, I can tell him to please stop the killing now, after four years, and end that war, which doesn't make any sense from their point of view either, because tens of thousands of Russians have lost their lives. I don't think he is going to end the war on my advice. I very much hope that he will be forced to do so regardless. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）：如果弗拉基米尔·普京给我打电话，我会接听。我不认为会发生这种情况。我自己不会给他打电话，但如果我们确实交谈，我可以告诉他，请在四年后立即停止杀戮，结束那场战争，从他们的角度来看，这场战争也没有任何意义，因为成千上万的俄罗斯人已经失去了生命。我不认为他会听从我的建议结束战争。我非常希望他无论如何都会被迫这样做。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to USNI News, citing two defense officials, the USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) and its escorts, USS Donald Cook (DDG-75), USS Mason (DDG-87) and USS Ross (DDG-71), did not transit the Strait of Gibraltar and are instead sailing around the southern tip of Africa. The carrier strike group is currently operating off the coast of Namibia, as it makes the trip avoiding the Suez Canal transit and the potentially contested zones of the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb Strait. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据USNI新闻援引两名国防官员的话称，乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）及其护航舰艇唐纳德·库克号（DDG-75）、梅森号（DDG-87）和罗斯号（DDG-71）没有通过直布罗陀海峡，而是绕行非洲南端。该航母打击群目前正在纳米比亚海岸外行动，避开了苏伊士运河航线以及红海和曼德海峡等潜在的冲突区域。推文

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary-General Sheikh Naim Qassem on attempts to create sectarian strife: "They are starting to promote that Turkey is creating a problem between Sunnis and Shia. Who is working on this? The Americans and the Israelis and Israel's servants internally. They want the strife to be between others, so they can get rid of both. We with our brothers the Sunnis are one heart. This strife, they will not succeed in it. Israel's servants will fail. We will not allow strife to raise its head. The Christians of all their sects and the Muslims of all their denominations — Sunnis and Druze and Alawites and all — are our brothers in the nation, in religion, and in the heavenly messages. What unites us is much stronger than the devils of the interior and exterior and the trumpets of strife." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆（Sheikh Naim Qassem）关于制造宗派冲突的企图：“他们开始宣传土耳其正在制造逊尼派和什叶派之间的问题。谁在做这件事？美国人、以色列人和以色列在内部的仆从。他们希望冲突发生在别人之间，这样他们就可以摆脱双方。我们与我们的逊尼派兄弟是一条心。这种冲突，他们不会得逞。以色列的仆从将会失败。我们不会允许冲突抬头。所有教派的基督徒和所有教派的穆斯林——逊尼派、德鲁兹派、阿拉维派等等——都是我们在国家、宗教和天启信息中的兄弟。团结我们的东西比内部和外部的魔鬼以及冲突的号角要强大得多。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel RT @just_whatever : Somebody needs to say it Bint Jbeil is a town, which means it is a tough urban battle in which hundreds of Hezbollah fighters were eliminated in the last few days and luckily until now only a handful of IDF soldiers were wounded It is an insane ratio between attack and defense Update https://twitter.com/MarioLeb79/status/2043733842406539272/photo/1 -  𝓂𝒶𝓇𝒾𝑜 🇱🇧 🇬🇧 🇦🇪 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 转推 @just_whatever：有人需要说出来，宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）是一个城镇，这意味着这是一场艰难的城市战，过去几天里数百名真主党战士被消灭，幸运的是到目前为止只有少数以色列国防军士兵受伤。这是一个疯狂的攻防比例。更新 https://twitter.com/MarioLeb79/status/2043733842406539272/photo/1 -  𝓂𝒶𝓇𝒾𝑜 🇱🇧 🇬🇧 🇦🇪 推文

text_zh: Open Source Intel 重要更正 🔴 关于中国国防部长在霍尔木兹海峡的引述，我核实过了，但基础来源很差。未经证实。已撤回。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043771641931456944/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The US Army reportedly fired its entire stockpile of PRSM long-range ballistic missiles at Iran early in the war -Aviation Week Replacements are reportedly coming soon. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043770959799234664/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 据报道，美国陆军在战争初期向伊朗发射了其全部PRSM远程弹道导弹库存 -Aviation Week 据报道，替换导弹即将到来。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043770959799234664/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @DefenseBulletin : Note: Chinese Defense Minister Comments At the time of writing, the statement attributed to Chinese Defense Minister Dong Jun is not credible, as no release has been viewed on Chinese Foreign Ministry/Ministry of Defense releases. Also, it’s not the MO of principal Chinese decision-makers to make statements to press independent of Foreign Ministry and Ministry of Defense releases on matters at hand. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @DefenseBulletin：注意：中国国防部长评论。在撰写本文时，归因于中国国防部长董军的声明不可信，因为在中国外交部/国防部的发布中没有看到相关内容。此外，中国主要决策者在处理相关事务时，不独立于外交部和国防部发布声明，这不是他们的行事方式。推文

text: WarMonitor China’s Defense Minister says Chinese ships will keep moving through the Strait of Hormuz since it has Iran's permission, and warns the U.S. not to “meddle.” In other words... China is calling Trump's bluff. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 中国国防部长表示，中国船只将继续通过霍尔木兹海峡，因为这得到了伊朗的许可，并警告美国不要“干涉”。换句话说……中国正在拆穿特朗普的虚张声势。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Speaker of Parliament, Ghalibaf: Honoring Pope Leo’s fearless stand! “I have no fear” echoes as he condemns the war crimes of Israel and the US. This slogan lights the path for all who refuse to stay silent on the killing of innocents. Pontifex leadership inspires millions – thank you for this light! tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会议长加利巴夫（Ghalibaf）：向教皇利奥无畏的立场致敬！当他谴责以色列和美国的战争罪行时，“我无所畏惧”的回声响起。这个口号为所有拒绝在杀害无辜者面前保持沉默的人照亮了道路。教皇的领导力激励了数百万人——感谢这份光明！推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 ⚡️ Trump deleted his AI-generated image on TRUTH Social, depicting himself as Jesus Christ.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 ⚡️ 特朗普删除了他在TRUTH Social上发布的AI生成图像，该图像描绘了他自己作为耶稣基督。

text: BIG: A U.S. Army unit ran out of its ENTIRE stock of Precision Strike Missiles (PRSM) early in last month’s war with Iran. The missile — still in testing at the time — was used in combat for the first time and expended quickly. SOURCE
text_zh: 重磅：美国陆军的一个部队在上个月与伊朗的战争初期耗尽了其全部精确打击导弹（PRSM）库存。该导弹——当时仍处于测试阶段——首次用于实战并迅速耗尽。来源

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇻🇦🇺🇸 "I have no fear of the Trump administration or speaking out loudly of the message of the Gospel, which is what I believe I am here to do, what the Church is here to do." - Pope Leo XIV 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf publicly honors Pope Leo XIV for condemning US and Israeli war crimes, calling his stance "fearless." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇻🇦🇺🇸 “我不害怕特朗普政府，也不害怕大声说出福音的信息，我相信我在这里就是为了做这件事，教会在这里也是为了做这件事。” - 教皇利奥十四世 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·加利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）公开向教皇利奥十四世致敬，因为他谴责了美国和以色列的战争罪行，称他的立场是“无畏的”。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: I think you voted for me. DoorDash worker: Uhh, maybe.
text_zh: 特朗普：我想你投了我的票。DoorDash员工：呃，也许吧。

text: Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem urged Lebanon to cancel planned talks with Israel in Washington, calling them pointless, while vowing to continue confronting Israeli attacks.
text_zh: 真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆（Naim Qassem）敦促黎巴嫩取消计划中在华盛顿与以色列的会谈，称其毫无意义，并誓言继续对抗以色列的袭击。

text: The U.S. and Iran are still in contact after failed weekend talks, with officials saying there is “forward motion” toward a possible agreement. Source: CBS News
text_zh: 美国和伊朗在周末会谈失败后仍保持联系，官员们表示，在达成可能协议方面存在“向前推进”。来源：CBS新闻

text: Venezuela is set to grant new oil fields to Chevron to boost production, as part of efforts to attract foreign investment and revive its energy sector. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 委内瑞拉准备向雪佛龙（Chevron）授予新的油田以提高产量，作为吸引外国投资和振兴其能源部门努力的一部分。来源：彭博社

text: Netanyahu attacks Europe: Europe is losing control of its identity, infected with deep moral weakness.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡抨击欧洲：欧洲正在失去对其身份的控制，被深层的道德软弱所感染。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Security inspectors at the Shavei Shomron crossing stopped a garbage truck arriving from the east, where approximately 40 Palestinian illegal border crossers were found hiding in the waste compartment. Several were unconscious and are being treated by Magen David Adom. All suspects have been transferred to security forces. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Shavei Shomron检查站的安全检查员拦下了一辆从东部驶来的垃圾车，在垃圾箱中发现了大约40名非法越境的巴勒斯坦人。几人失去知觉，正在接受以色列红大卫盾会（Magen David Adom）的治疗。所有嫌疑人已被移交给安全部队。@wfwitness

text: Trump officials are considering a possible second in-person meeting with Iranian officials before the ceasefire expires next week, though plans are still early and uncertain. Source: CNN
text_zh: 特朗普官员正在考虑在下周停火协议到期前与伊朗官员进行第二次面对面会晤的可能性，尽管计划仍处于早期阶段且不确定。来源：CNN

text: The U.S. asked Iran to stop enriching uranium for 20 years during recent talks, but Iran pushed back, offering only a much shorter limit. The disagreement over uranium enrichment and Iran’s existing stockpile was the main reason no deal was reached. Source: Axios
text_zh: 美国在最近的会谈中要求伊朗停止浓缩铀20年，但伊朗予以回绝，仅提供了一个短得多的限制期限。关于铀浓缩和伊朗现有库存的分歧是未能达成协议的主要原因。来源：Axios

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇺🇸⚡️REPORTER: Did you post that picture of yourself depicted as Jesus Christ? TRUMP: I did post it and I thought it was me as a doctor" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor China’s Defense Minister says Chinese ships will keep moving through the Strait of Hormuz since it has Iran's permission, and warns the U.S. not to “meddle.” tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 中国国防部长表示，中国船只将继续通过霍尔木兹海峡，因为这得到了伊朗的许可，并警告美国不要“干涉”。推文

text: WarTranslated Magyar confirmed the strike on the Russian chemical plant "PhosAgro." "Bon 'Apatit' to the Cherepovets chemical plant - the SBS Birds' homemade Easter eggs have been delivered." - the SBS Commander wrote. /1680956281/2203 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043767437770752127/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 马扎尔证实了对俄罗斯“PhosAgro”化工厂的袭击。“给切列波韦茨化工厂的‘磷灰石’——SBS鸟儿自制的复活节彩蛋已经送达。” - SBS指挥官写道。/1680956281/2203 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043767437770752127/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 The U.K. has dispatched two military planners to U.S. CENTCOM to explore options for safeguarding the Strait of Hormuz post-conflict. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 新消息 🔴 英国已向美国中央司令部派遣了两名军事规划人员，以探索冲突后保护霍尔木兹海峡的方案。推文

text: WarMonitor I'm actually going to see a doctor today, and I have questions. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 我今天真的要去看医生，我有问题要问。推文

text: OSINTdefender Asked earlier at the White House about one of his posts last night on TruthSocial, which included a picture of himself depicted as Jesus Christ, President Trump responded: “I thought it was me as a doctor and had to do with Red Cross, as a Red Cross worker there, which we support. And only the fake news could come up with that one. It's supposed to be me as a doctor making people better. And I do make people better. I make people a lot better.” After attacking the Head of the Catholic Church, Pope Leo XIV, in a rambling post earlier tonight for his criticisms of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, President Trump posted this AI image to TruthSocial, portraying himself as Jesus Christ. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043561732166070591/photo/1 - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 当早些时候在白宫被问及他昨晚在TruthSocial上发布的一篇帖子时，其中包括一张他自己被描绘成耶稣基督的照片，特朗普总统回应道：“我以为那是作为医生的我，这与红十字会有关，作为那里的红十字会工作人员，我们支持这一点。只有假新闻才能想出那个。那应该是作为医生的我让人们变得更好。我确实让人们变得更好。我让人们变得好多了。” 在今晚早些时候的一篇漫无边际的帖子中攻击了天主教会领袖教皇利奥十四世，因为他批评了中东正在进行的冲突后，特朗普总统将这张AI图像发布到了TruthSocial，将自己描绘成耶稣基督。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043561732166070591/photo/1 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: ⚡ 🇷🇺 Russia is believed to be about to test once again its Sarmat heavy ICBM this week. NOTAMs similar to the last test (which has ended in a failure) have been issued between tomorrow and Friday. The missile will be launched from the Kura test range near Kazakhstan. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇷🇺 据信俄罗斯本周将再次测试其萨尔马特（Sarmat）重型洲际弹道导弹。与上次测试（以失败告终）类似的航行通告（NOTAMs）已在明天至周五之间发布。导弹将从靠近哈萨克斯坦的库拉（Kura）试验场发射。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN : Trump administration officials are internally discussing details for a potential second in‑person meeting with Iranian officials before the ceasefire expires next week. Preliminary discussions are under way on potential dates and locations, including Geneva and Islamabad. Turkey is working to bridge gaps between the two sides. Officials remain hopeful a diplomatic off‑ramp is achievable, and the ceasefire deadline could be extended to allow more time. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN：特朗普政府官员正在内部讨论在下周停火协议到期前与伊朗官员进行第二次面对面会晤的细节。关于潜在日期和地点的初步讨论正在进行中，包括日内瓦和伊斯兰堡。土耳其正在努力弥合双方之间的分歧。官员们仍然对实现外交退出机制抱有希望，停火期限可能会延长以留出更多时间。@wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary-General Sheikh Naim Qassem: "Our decision in the Resistance is not to calm down, not to stop, not to surrender. We will let the battlefield speak. We reject negotiations with the usurping Israeli entity. These negotiations are absurd." Direct negotiations with Israel require Lebanese consensus on changing the compass from non-negotiation to negotiation "and this has not happened. No one has the right to take Lebanon down this path without internal consensus among its components." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆（Sheikh Naim Qassem）：“我们在抵抗运动中的决定是不冷静、不停止、不投降。我们将让战场说话。我们拒绝与篡权的以色列实体进行谈判。这些谈判是荒谬的。” 与以色列的直接谈判需要黎巴嫩就将指南针从非谈判转向谈判达成共识，“而这并没有发生。在没有其组成部分内部共识的情况下，没有人有权让黎巴嫩走上这条道路。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Israeli military has released footage showing the killing of a Hezbollah fighter in Bint Jbeil using a FPV drone. Troops of the Egoz commando unit identified and killed a alleged group planning drone attacks on Israeli forces. A short while…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 New footage of the same incident released by the IDF showcasing the FPV drone striking a Hezbollah operative in Bint Jbeil. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列军方发布了显示使用FPV无人机在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）杀害一名真主党战士的视频。Egoz突击队的士兵识别并杀死了据称计划对以色列军队进行无人机袭击的组织。不久前……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发布的同一事件的新视频，展示了FPV无人机在宾特朱拜勒袭击了一名真主党特工。@wfwitness

text: ✝️ ☪️ One day after Trump publicly attacked him, Pope Leo XIV visited the Grand Mosque in Algiers on his historic visit to Africa. No statement needed. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ✝️ ☪️ 在特朗普公开攻击他一天后，教皇利奥十四世在对非洲的历史性访问中参观了阿尔及尔大清真寺。无需声明。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: بالفيديو | ارمِ مسَدَّد علي جبينك... جودة عالية
text_zh: 视频 | 投掷精准，瞄准你的额头... 高清

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasem: “ You are truly strange! By God, you do not fight, nor do you let anyone else fight; you do not resist, nor do you let anyone else resist. Go and look at the Israeli enemy everyone there is fighting”
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench mirror：🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆：“你们真是奇怪！看在上帝的份上，你们既不战斗，也不让别人战斗；你们既不抵抗，也不让别人抵抗。去看看以色列敌人，那里每个人都在战斗”

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasem: “This negotiation is an act of submission and surrender, and we call for a heroic stance to cancel it. Nations will then come running to you, and you will establish the use of elements of strength to confront the Israeli enemy and force it to implement the agreements”
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench mirror：🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆：“这次谈判是一种屈服和投降的行为，我们呼吁采取英雄立场取消它。届时各国将奔向你们，你们将建立使用力量要素来对抗以色列敌人并迫使其执行协议”

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasem: “ We responded at the appropriate time and found that this was the right moment to proceed with implementing the agreement; it was then discovered that a massive aggressive plan had been prepared for Lebanon. We deprived the enemy of catching us by surprise and inflicting the very heavy losses that could have occurred. The enemy's goals are clear: to destroy the strength that Lebanon possesses as a prelude to "Greater Israel." For the record, all of Lebanon is targeted; when Israel occupies southern Lebanon, it means it is occupying Lebanon, and when it exerts pressure and spreads its killing across Lebanese territories, it means all of Lebanon is targeted. In the event of aggression, the Lebanese state is supposed to resist and task its army and forces to confront the aggression.”
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench mirror：🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆：“我们在适当的时候做出了回应，并发现这是推进执行协议的正确时机；随后发现为黎巴嫩准备了一个大规模的侵略计划。我们剥夺了敌人对我们进行突袭并造成可能发生的非常沉重损失的机会。敌人的目标很明确：摧毁黎巴嫩拥有的力量，作为‘大以色列’的前奏。记录在案，整个黎巴嫩都是目标；当以色列占领黎巴嫩南部时，意味着它正在占领黎巴嫩，当它施加压力并在黎巴嫩领土上散布杀戮时，意味着整个黎巴嫩都是目标。在发生侵略的情况下，黎巴嫩国家应该进行抵抗，并指派其军队和部队对抗侵略。”

text: WarMonitor So when Trump says the war on Iran is won, tankers are rushing to the U.S., and all these other fantasies... is he really seeing this in his head? I mean, if he can't tell the difference between Jesus and a doctor... he's either lying, or just insane. Both are dangerous. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 所以当特朗普说对伊朗的战争已经赢了，油轮正涌向美国，以及所有这些其他的幻想……他脑子里真的看到了这些吗？我的意思是，如果他分不清耶稣和医生……他要么是在撒谎，要么就是疯了。两者都很危险。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah leader Qassem: “We’ve chosen to fight to protect Lebanon.” He rejects U.S.-hosted talks with Israel, framing it as a binary choice: fight or surrender. “Surrender is not an option. Whoever wants it can do so alone.” He claims Hezbollah fighters are active across the battlefield, fighting “with the spirit of martyrs” and “to the death and victory,” invoking Karbala. Qassem adds that militants will capture Israeli soldiers “when the opportunity arises,” and says Hezbollah is striking from multiple directions, using mobile, hit and run tactics to block any IDF foothold. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党领导人卡西姆：“我们选择战斗来保护黎巴嫩。” 他拒绝了美国主办的与以色列的会谈，将其定性为二选一：战斗或投降。“投降不是一个选项。谁想要投降，谁就自己去。” 他声称真主党战士活跃在整个战场，以“烈士的精神”和“至死方休的胜利”进行战斗，援引卡尔巴拉（Karbala）。卡西姆补充说，武装分子将在“机会出现时”俘虏以色列士兵，并表示真主党正在从多个方向进行打击，使用机动、打带跑战术来阻止以色列国防军获得任何立足点。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @Etienne_Marcuz : 🇷🇺 🚀 Meanwhile, somewhere in Russia near Kazakhstan's border... 🚀 🇷🇺 SARMAT is trying again. The first two NOTAMs are identical to the ones broadcasted in November 2025, while the one over Kura test range is slightly different, so maybe different payloads and/or deployment strategy by the bus. The new testing period is between tomorrow and Friday. Following last November's major failure we published a @FRS_org with Christian Maire explaining why the R-36M2 and AVANGARD hypothesis was very unlikely, leaving SARMAT as the best candidate (link ⬇️ ). Will our big fella go a bit further this time...? https://www.frstrategie.org/en/publications/notes/analysis-and-possible-consequences-failure-russian-icbm-flight-28-november-2025-2026 cc @KomissarWhipla @krakek1 @The_Lookout_N @nukestrat @La_souris_DA @MatejRisko @Strike_Flanker @DDolzikova @russianforces @MeNMyRC1 @NicoleGrajewski tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 转推 @Etienne_Marcuz：🇷🇺 🚀 同时，在俄罗斯靠近哈萨克斯坦边境的某个地方…… 🚀 🇷🇺 萨尔马特（SARMAT）正在再次尝试。前两个航行通告（NOTAMs）与2025年11月广播的完全相同，而库拉（Kura）试验场上空的那个略有不同，所以可能是不同的有效载荷和/或母舱的部署策略。新的测试期在明天至周五之间。在去年11月发生重大失败后，我们发布了一份 @FRS_org，由克里斯蒂安·迈尔（Christian Maire）解释了为什么R-36M2和先锋（AVANGARD）假设非常不可能，留下了萨尔马特作为最佳候选者（链接 ⬇️ ）。我们的大家伙这次会走得更远一点吗……？https://www.frstrategie.org/en/publications/notes/analysis-and-possible-consequences-failure-russian-icbm-flight-28-november-2025-2026 cc @KomissarWhipla @krakek1 @The_Lookout_N @nukestrat @La_souris_DA @MatejRisko @Strike_Flanker @DDolzikova @russianforces @MeNMyRC1 @NicoleGrajewski 推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 The EU has set 27 conditions for Hungary’s new prime minister to unlock €35 billion in frozen funds, — FT ➡️ Key demands include approving a €90 billion loan for Ukraine and lifting Hungary’s veto on sanctions against Moscow. ➡️ The European Commission also expects rapid talks with Magyar over migration laws, which have already cost Hungary €1 million per day in fines. ➡️ Under Hungary’s constitution, the president has 30 days to swear in a new parliament. EU officials fear Viktor Orbán could use that window to push legal or personnel changes that could hinder compliance with Brussels’ demands. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 欧盟为匈牙利新总理设定了27个条件以解锁350亿欧元的冻结资金，——金融时报（FT） ➡️ 主要要求包括批准向乌克兰提供900亿欧元的贷款，并取消匈牙利对针对莫斯科制裁的否决权。➡️ 欧盟委员会还期望与马扎尔就移民法进行快速会谈，这些法律已经使匈牙利每天损失100万欧元的罚款。➡️ 根据匈牙利宪法，总统有30天的时间让新议会宣誓就职。欧盟官员担心维克多·欧尔班（Viktor Orbán）可能会利用这一窗口期推动法律或人事变动，从而阻碍对布鲁塞尔要求的遵守。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇰🇼 Hezbollah Secretary General on the alleged Terrorist cells found in Kuwait: "The Kuwaiti repeats the matter again, and here in Lebanon they denounce the fact that Hezbollah is carrying out this act" @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇰🇼 🇦🇪 Hezbollah Secretary General on the alleged Terrorist cells found in Kuwait and in the UAE: "Where is the evidence? There is no evidence at all. We do not have any parties or forces spread in the region or in the world." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇰🇼 真主党秘书长关于在科威特发现的所谓恐怖分子小组：“科威特人再次重复这件事，而在黎巴嫩，他们谴责真主党正在实施这一行为的事实” @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇰🇼 🇦🇪 真主党秘书长关于在科威特和阿联酋发现的所谓恐怖分子小组：“证据在哪里？根本没有证据。我们在该地区或世界上没有任何政党或部队。” @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 Péter Magyar says he will push a constitutional amendment to impose a two-term limit on Hungary’s prime minister. If adopted, the rule would block Viktor Orbán ever from returning to office. The proposal still requires approval through a constitutional vote. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）表示，他将推动一项宪法修正案，对匈牙利总理实施两届任期限制。如果获得通过，该规则将阻止维克多·欧尔班（Viktor Orbán）重返办公室。该提案仍需要通过宪法投票批准。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
